surface_strategies.cards: bg-white shadow-sm border border-black/5 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.premium_card: relative overflow-hidden border border-[#D4AF37]/30 bg-[#0B3A5A] text-white shadow-2xl

sections_breakdown.name: Hero
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Asymmetrical layout. Large H1 on left (col-span-7). Image on right (col-span-5) with soft rounded edges.

sections_breakdown.name: Problem Agitation
sections_breakdown.design_rules: 3 distinct cards outlining Internal Problem, External Problem, and Promise. Use subtle icons and generous padding.

sections_breakdown.name: About
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Include the video asset. Warm narrative text.

sections_breakdown.name: Testimonials
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Use glassmorphism cards to hold the WhatsApp screenshots to make them look elegant.

sections_breakdown.name: Formations Catalog
sections_breakdown.design_rules: 4 tiers. The VIP tier must use the premium_card surface strategy to stand out.

sections_breakdown.name: Lead Magnet Quiz
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Use solid background with a hard bottom border or glassmorphism. Keep UI frictionless.

sections_breakdown.name: Webinar
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Form on the right. Value prop on the left. High contrast section (e.g., bg_dark).

sections_breakdown.name: Book Promotion
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Display CSS-based book representation, 3 format options (Ebook, Audio, Print).

sections_breakdown.name: Media/Press
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Editorial Ribbon mode. Pale background, dark text/logos, massive gaps, slow moving.

sections_breakdown.name: Blog
sections_breakdown.design_rules: Clean cards with image, category tag, and title.

hero_portrait.description: Professional African American woman, represents Coach Lady Wassa.

neuroscience_abstract.description: Abstract brain motif for neuroscience sections.

media_bg.description: TV Studio background for media section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text is in French as requested.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato', 'Syne' for Headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or 'Outfit'.
Follow 'The Anti-Default Rule' - avoid center-everything, use grids and asymmetry.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
For CTAs, primary action is WhatsApp redirect.
Never use via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the provided image URLs.
Implement Shadcn for UI components like Accordion, Input, Button, but customize to fit the theme (remove default Vercel look).
Apply Framer Motion for scroll reveal animations and micro-interactions.
